title: Minecraft Bedrock PBR Fallback Settings 1.21.40
description: Default PBR fallback values when texture set detail isn't provided for blocks, entities, particles, or items.

format_version.description: The 3-part schema version for parsing these PBR fallback settings.

minecraft:pbr_fallback_settings.description: The root object containing default PBR values for blocks, actors, particles, and items.

mers_color.description: A Metalness, Emissive, Roughness, Subsurface (MERS) color value expressed as either an RGBA array of four numbers in the 0-255 range, or an eight-digit hexadecimal string.

mers_settings.description: Default MERS value for a category when not defined via texture set.

global_metalness_emissive_roughness_subs.description: The default metalness, emissive, roughness, and subsurface values applied uniformly across the entire surface.
